{{CargoRelic
|name=Pan's Flute
|class_id=20142
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=Pan was once obsessed with Syrinx, goddess of Mountains and Forests, but she would rather turn into a reed than accept him. Pan made the reed into a musical instrument bearing the name of his beloved Syrinx. And then Pan abandoned this flute that accompanied him for most of his life.
|fame=10
|art=31
|fth=17
|civ=14
|tech=18
|ss1=Per 6 Wicked Costume Stars, Snail RUSH +1<br>Wicked Stars: 192/192
|ss2=Per 6 Wicked Costume Stars, Snail RUSH +2<br>Wicked Stars: 192/192
|ss3=Per 6 Wicked Costume Stars, Snail RUSH +3<br>Wicked Stars: 192/192
|ss4=Per 6 Wicked Costume Stars, Snail RUSH +3<br>Wicked Stars: 192/192
|ss7=Per 6 Wicked Costume Stars, Snail RUSH +3<br>Wicked Stars: 192/192<br> (Awakened)
}}
